atk1-text: Roll STR + TR vs. STR + SR against an adjacent insect. The target gains Wounds for each net success.
atk2-text: Roll KEN + TR vs. KEN + SR against an adjacent insect. The target gains Wounds for each Net Success.
atk3-text: Roll Carapace + TR vs. STR + SR against an adjacent Insect. For each Net Success, the target gains Wounds and an adjacent Ally gains a positive modifier to her next Attack Resistance Roll.
